text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what kind of race we'll see in the fight
for the Autumn Shield.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
You can feel the enthusiasm of the crowd today
here at the autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian! I've had high hopes for you since
spring!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I'm rooting for you! Do your best today for your
sister's sake too!

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser! Give it your all this time!
And take the win!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Keep your focus till the end! Once the race
starts, there's no going back!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Th-the cheers for me seem to have a slightly
different tone to them...

text_block_list.name: Spectator E
text_block_list.text: Please just finish the race in one piece!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... I'll do my best!

Matikanetannhauser waves in response to the
cheers and a harmonious laughter fills the
paddock.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch, what's with this lax vibe? This isn't some field
day for brats!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Are they even taking this seriously?
choice_data_list: Pay it no mind and just focus.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Give me a break...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm off then.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Now at the paddock, it's none other than Narita
Brian!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: O-Ooh! She looks like a boss!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: But, s-still... I have no intention of losing!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: A-agh! Don't look at me with such a scary face!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I was just trying to say how I felt! I wasn't trying to
start a fight or anything!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Oh, she's challenging Brian to battle?! Don't get
too nervous and collapse!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Aha... I-I'm okay.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It seems like the fans are also worried. I always
fumble things at the most important times.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But I've worked hard to get this far. Every day, I
picture the faces of those I wish to defeat.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I put so much time into figuring out how to win
that I don't have time to be scared.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I've studied your form countless times, searching
for my path to victory...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Just like... everyone else does. Hahaha, who am I
kidding? I can't hope to compare to you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...You do.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Only a handful of racers reach the G1. Even
among those who manage to keep an unbroken
spirit, this is a stage that only a chosen few can
compete on.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm going to bring you down with
everything I've got. I've come here to seize
victory.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
So you better come at me too... with the intent to
crush me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: R-right!
